articles.title: Steam Deck Sells Out Despite Price Increase
articles.description: Steam Deck is sold out in North America, while Europe, Australia, and Asia still have stock available. Demand remains high despite the price hike.
articles.impact: Steam Deck's popularity continues to soar.

articles.title: Modern Warfare 4 Unveiled with Stunning Trailer
articles.description: Infinity Ward reveals details and a trailer for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, promising an epic campaign with new characters.
articles.impact: Modern Warfare 4 aims to captivate gamers.

articles.title: Apple's Siri App Set for Major Overhaul
articles.description: Apple plans a significant redesign of Siri for iOS 27, featuring a standalone app and enhanced AI capabilities.
articles.impact: Apple aims to compete with ChatGPT.

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Hardware Leaks
articles.description: New leaks reveal Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a wider design and thin frame, showcasing its innovative hardware.
articles.impact: Samsung continues to innovate in foldables.

articles.title: Rockstar Games Offers New Money Laundering Bonuses
articles.description: Rockstar introduces new bonuses for players in GTA Online, allowing them to enhance their money laundering operations.
key_points: Free for Hands On Car Wash owners
articles.impact: GTA Online expands its gameplay options.

articles.title: Persona 6 Protagonist Leaks Surprise Fans
articles.description: Rumors about Persona 6's protagonist leak, intensifying excitement among fans after years of speculation.
articles.impact: Fans eagerly await Persona 6's release.

articles.title: Qualcomm Launches Snapdragon C for Budget Laptops
articles.description: Qualcomm introduces Snapdragon C, targeting budget Windows 11 ARM laptops priced from $300.
articles.impact: Qualcomm aims to dominate budget laptop market.

articles.title: Destiny 2's Future Uncertain Amid New Info
articles.description: New insights reveal challenges faced by Destiny 2 and the role of Marathon in its future.
articles.impact: Bungie's plans for Destiny 2 are unclear.

articles.title: Intel's First Handheld Gaming Chip Unveiled
articles.description: Intel introduces the Arc G3, its first handheld gaming chip, with Acer set to use it in a new device.
articles.impact: Intel enters the handheld gaming market.

articles.title: Apple to Focus on On-Device AI at WWDC
articles.description: Apple plans to showcase AI upgrades at its upcoming developer conference, emphasizing on-device processing over cloud reliance.
articles.impact: Apple aims to enhance user privacy.

articles.title: Oura Ring 5 Launches with New Health Features
articles.description: Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller and introduces new health tracking features, including hypertension and sleep apnea detection.
articles.impact: Oura enhances health monitoring capabilities.

articles.title: The Witcher 3 Expansion Announced
articles.description: CD Projekt confirms The Witcher 3: Songs of the Past as an expansion, not DLC, emphasizing its significance.
articles.impact: The Witcher 3 expands its universe.

articles.title: Bungie Reveals Marathon Season 2 Details
articles.description: Bungie announces new content for Marathon Season 2, including a free-to-play week and new class features.
articles.impact: Bungie enhances Marathon's gameplay experience.

articles.title: Krafton to Pay $250 Million to Subnautica 2 Devs
articles.description: Krafton agrees to a $250 million earnout to Subnautica 2 developers following the game's successful launch.
articles.impact: Krafton rewards developers for success.

articles.title: Sony Launches True RGB TVs for Enhanced Viewing
articles.description: Sony's new BRAVIA series TVs feature true RGB technology for improved color accuracy and viewing angles.
articles.impact: Sony sets a new standard for TVs.

articles.title: Websites Can Now Spy on SSD Activity
articles.description: New methods allow websites to analyze SSD activity through JavaScript, raising privacy concerns.
articles.impact: User privacy faces new challenges.

articles.title: Microsoft's Bing Gains Ground Amid Google Issues
articles.description: As Google struggles with AI features, Microsoft has a rare opportunity to attract frustrated users to Bing.
articles.impact: Bing could gain significant market share.

articles.title: DuckDuckGo Sees Growth from Google Users
articles.description: DuckDuckGo experiences growth as users seek alternatives to Google's AI-driven search features.
articles.impact: DuckDuckGo capitalizes on user dissatisfaction.

articles.title: No Man's Sky Update Features Epic Space Battles
articles.description: The Swarm update for No Man's Sky introduces massive space battles against an intergalactic threat.
articles.impact: No Man's Sky enhances its gameplay experience.

articles.title: Marvel Rivals Launches Free-to-Play Update
articles.description: Marvel Rivals announces a new patch, allowing players to enjoy the game for free with exciting new content.
articles.impact: Marvel Rivals attracts new players.

articles.title: Sony's DualSense Controllers on Sale
articles.description: Sony's DualSense and DualSense Edge controllers are discounted by up to $30 until June 10th, making them more affordable.
articles.impact: Sony boosts controller sales with discounts.

articles.title: Roku Redesigns Home Screen for Better Experience
articles.description: Roku unveils its most significant home screen redesign in over a decade, aiming for a more dynamic and personalized user experience.
articles.impact: Roku enhances user engagement with redesign.

articles.title: Dragon Quest XII Development Restarted
articles.description: Dragon Quest XII's development has restarted, with a new name and trailer revealed during a livestream event.
articles.impact: Dragon Quest XII aims for a fresh start.

articles.title: Manitou's Gen 2 Mezzer Fork Impresses Reviewers
articles.description: The new Mezzer fork is praised for its sensitivity and smooth performance, setting a high standard for mountain biking.
articles.impact: Manitou raises the bar for mountain biking.

articles.title: FBI Warns Outlook, Teams, OneDrive Users
articles.description: The FBI issues a warning regarding potential security threats for users of Outlook, Teams, and OneDrive.
articles.impact: Security risks prompt FBI alert.

articles.title: Hidden iPhone Features Revealed
articles.description: A BuzzFeed article uncovers 22 hidden features of the iPhone, surprising many users with new functionalities.
articles.impact: iPhone users discover new capabilities.

articles.title: Windows 11 Update Improves Performance
articles.description: Microsoft releases the KB5089573 update for Windows 11, featuring 30 changes that enhance performance and reliability.
articles.impact: Windows 11 users benefit from updates.

articles.title: Take-Two's CEO Discusses Game Development Challenges
articles.description: Take-Two's Strauss Zelnick highlights the difficulties in creating hit games like GTA, referencing past failures.
articles.impact: Take-Two reflects on industry challenges.

articles.title: Trump Mobile Phone Review Sparks Controversy
articles.description: A tech expert critiques the Trump Mobile phone, comparing its design to a urine sample, raising eyebrows.
articles.impact: Review sparks debate over phone design.
